import ldap3


def search_user(username: str) -> list:
    server = ldap3.Server("ldap://directory.example.com")
    conn = ldap3.Connection(server, user="cn=admin", password="secret", auto_bind=True)
    search_filter = f"(uid={username})"
    conn.search("dc=example,dc=com", search_filter)
    return conn.entries


def find_group_members(group_name: str) -> list:
    server = ldap3.Server("ldap://directory.example.com")
    conn = ldap3.Connection(server, user="cn=admin", password="secret", auto_bind=True)
    filt = f"(&(objectClass=group)(cn={group_name}))"
    conn.search("ou=groups,dc=example,dc=com", filt)
    return conn.entries


def search_by_email(email: str) -> list:
    server = ldap3.Server("ldap://directory.example.com")
    conn = ldap3.Connection(server, user="cn=admin", password="secret", auto_bind=True)
    search_filter = f"(mail={email})"
    conn.search("dc=example,dc=com", search_filter)
    return conn.entries
